Get Started

FOR DISTRIBUTORS

Access the World's Most Secure Coupon Supply

Choose your role. Source inventory as an Inventory Buyer, or licence our platform as a Distribution Partner.

Explore Buyer Model Explore Partner Model
INVENTORY BUYER

Source, Distribute, and Earn

Access verified coupon inventory from hundreds of merchants. Distribute through your platform and generate revenue on every successful redemption.

Who This Is For

Banks & Financial Institutions

Enhance credit card perks and loyalty programs with verified merchant deals

Corporates & HR Platforms

Power employee benefits programs with curated discounts and perks

Telcos & Digital Wallets

Add value to your mobile app with branded coupons and exclusive deals

How It Works

1
JOIN

Apply for Buyer Access

Complete KYB verification and get approved as a licensed inventory buyer on the Mezzofy Exchange

2
SOURCE

Browse & Acquire Inventory

Purchase outright or consign coupon inventory from verified merchants across multiple categories

3
DISTRIBUTE

Deploy to Your Audience

Push coupons through your loyalty app, HR portal, or Mezzofy white-label wallet and earn on every redemption

Acquisition Options

Upfront Purchase

Buy coupon inventory at cost from the Mezzofy Exchange. You own the inventory, set your own distribution price, and keep the margin on every sale.

  • Full inventory ownership
  • Set your own retail price and margin
  • Ideal for high-volume loyalty programs

Consignment Model

Source inventory without upfront capital. Mezzofy holds inventory in escrow and you pay only when a coupon is successfully redeemed by an end customer.

  • Zero upfront inventory cost
  • Pay only on successful redemption
  • Risk-free distribution model

Pricing Structure

Coupon Type Fee Trigger Fee Formula Example
Digital Coupon On successful redemption X% of face value $10 coupon → $X fee
NFC Coupon On successful redemption X% of face value $10 NFC coupon → $X fee
Gift Voucher On successful redemption X% of face value $50 voucher → $X fee
Bulk Batch On batch purchase Negotiated rate Per arrangement

* Exact fee percentages are provided upon application approval. No monthly subscription fees.

Optional Add-Ons

White-Label Wallet

Deploy your own branded coupon wallet powered by Mezzofy infrastructure

Analytics Dashboard

Real-time redemption data, user behaviour insights, and ROI reporting

Apply for Buyer Access View API Documentation
DISTRIBUTION PARTNER

Licence Our Platform, Build Your Network

Become a licensed Mezzofy Distribution Partner. Integrate our API, grow your merchant and consumer base, and earn revenue share on every transaction processed through your network.

Who This Is For

HR & Benefits Platforms

Add coupon distribution to your employee benefits ecosystem and generate new recurring revenue

NFC & POS Partners

Embed secure NFC coupon issuance and redemption into your terminal or payment infrastructure

Local Business Networks

Aggregate local merchants and consumers into a branded coupon marketplace powered by Mezzofy

How It Works

1
LICENCE

Apply for Partner Licence

Complete KYB verification and sign the Mezzofy Distribution Partner Agreement. No upfront licence or setup fees.

2
INTEGRATE

Connect via API

Use our RESTful Bridge API to integrate coupon issuance, distribution, and redemption into your existing platform

3
EARN

Earn Revenue Share

Receive X% revenue share on every coupon transaction processed through your distribution network, paid monthly

Partner Fee Structure

Fee Type Structure Notes
Licence Fee Zero upfront No setup or monthly subscription fees
Revenue Share X% of redemption fees Paid monthly, based on transaction volume
API Access Free Unlimited API calls included in licence

* Revenue share percentage is confirmed upon application approval. No monthly subscription fees.

What You Can Do as a Partner

Issue Coupons via API

Programmatically create and distribute coupons at scale across your network

Validate & Redeem Securely

HMAC-signed NFC coupons prevent fraud at every point of redemption

White-Label Your Brand

Deploy entirely under your own brand with Mezzofy infrastructure powering it

Access Analytics

Track performance, redemption rates, and earnings in real time

Optional Add-Ons

Marketing Module

Campaign creation, push notifications, and A/B testing tools for your distribution network

NFC Hardware Support

Physical NFC card provisioning and secure cryptographic key management

Apply for Partner Licence View Partner API Docs

Why Demand Partners Choose Mezzofy

Built on the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol — the global standard for secure, fraud-proof coupon infrastructure

Fraud-Proof Inventory

Every coupon is HMAC-signed and protocol-validated. Zero counterfeit risk for your distribution network.

Free API Access

Full Bridge API access included for all partners. No per-call fees, no API key costs, no rate limits on standard tiers.

Global Standards

ISO-compliant coupon formats. Operate across borders with standardised inventory that works anywhere in the world.

Mezzofy Coupon Custody

Mezzofy acts as trusted custodian for all inventory. Merchants and buyers are protected by protocol-layer escrow.

Mezzofy

Building the future of coupon infrastructure through the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol.
